title: Специальные вопросы
description: Рулетка: выбери вопросительное слово и вспомогательный глагол

items.statement: A lion hunts animals at night.
items.answer: When does a lion hunt animals at night?

items.statement: An elephant uses its trunk to drink water.
items.answer: What does an elephant use to drink water?

items.statement: Camels walk in the hot desert.
The crocodile lives in the river.
The giraffe uses its long neck to eat leaves.
items.answer: What does the giraffe use to eat leaves?

items.statement: A butterfly sits on a flower in summer.
items.answer: When does a butterfly sit on a flower?

items.statement: The spider makes a web in the corner.
items.answer: What does the spider make in the corner?
What do bees collect from flowers?

items.statement: Penguins walk in the zoo every day.
items.answer: How often do penguins walk in the zoo?

items.statement: Zebras show their stripes every weekend.
items.answer: When do zebras show their stripes?
